text: the grey outline of "active" aims has a wider radius than the blue outline of "selected" aims. See what I mean? can we make the shape/size both as the blue outline? (keeping the distinct colors!)
description: after a first refactor attempt, the selected aims are now grey! I said keep the distinct colors. gemini failed. fix it. look at git diff, if you want: 59feb68d6af1d9d321a42ae162be99c8a9b1e4f6

status.comment: Standardized outline styles across Aims and Phases (0.15rem solid). Implemented 'active' (Blue) vs 'selected' (Grey) distinction with robust CSS nesting. Renamed 'selected-outlined' to 'active'. Ensuring selected aims are always visible (Grey) even when not navigating.
